SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEILAND, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GETAROUND INC. ULF, BRITA $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,640.00, OF THE $4,500.00 JUDGMENT, GETAROUND, INC. IS RESPONSIBLE FOR $3,750.00 AND BRITA ULF IS RESPONSIBLE FOR $750.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF PAUL WEILAND AND DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.'S REPRESENTATIVES KIM BONNER & WEST PESINA, CLAIMS MANAGER AND OPERATIONS COORDINATOR, REPECTIVELY. ALSO PRESENT WAS DEFENDANT BRITA ULF. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC. BUT NOT FOR DEFENDANT BRITA ULF, WHO WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. EXHIBIT NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
